title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video exploring Claude AI's responses to questions about ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation through structured interrogation. The creator examines conceptual boundaries in AI system behavior across multiple conversational "acts" without framing the exploration as speculative science fiction.
